description: Create a content slide on expectations for society in 2024 with a left-side text panel and a right-side line chart showing global average agreement from 2020 to 2024.

header.headline: Expectations for society in 2024 in an historical context
header.sub: Please indicate if you agree very much, agree somewhat, disagree somewhat or disagree very much with the following statements...?

sidebar.body: Please indicate if you agree very much, agree somewhat, disagree somewhat or disagree very much with the following statements...?

series.name: People in my country will become more tolerant of each other

footer.source: Base: 23,721 adults aged 18 years and older in India, 18-74 in Canada, Republic of Ireland, Malaysia, the Philippines, South Africa, Turkey, and the United States, 20-74 in Thailand, 21-74 in Indonesia and Singapore, and 16-74 in all other countries. Friday, October 25 – Friday November 8, 2024. © Ipsos Predictions 2025 Report
